sections.paragraph:
(“whom Jehovah strengthened”), Amaziah, pr.n.-

(1) the son of Joash, the father of Uzziah, who held the kingdom of Judah from 838-811 B.C. 2 Ki. 12:22 14:1 , seq.; 2Ch 25:1, seq.; also אֲמַצְיָהוּ 2Ki 14:1 9:11 .-(2) a priest of the calf, hostile to Amos, Amo 7:10, seq.-(3) 1Ch 4:34.-(4) 1Ch 6:30.
